entry.title: New IDC W91QUZ07D0006 awarded to DELL FEDERAL SYSTEMS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:whoCanUse: OTHER:ALL FEDERAL AGENCIES MAY PLACE ORDER AGAINST THE CONTRACT.
ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Available on Army Small Computer Program Website, https://ascp.monmouth.army.mil.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY NETWORK SOLUTIONS INCLUDING HARDWARE AND RELATED SERVICES.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
